text:
This subchapter does not:

(1) supersede or conflict with an existing statute regulating the marking of a road or street; or

(2) void or supersede the authority of a local governmental agency to regulate and mark a road or street.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 6
### Chapter 225. State Highway Names
##### § 225.006 — Effect on Other Laws

This subchapter does not:

    (1) supersede or conflict with an existing statute regulating the marking of a road or street; or

    (2) void or supersede the authority of a local governmental agency to regulate and mark a road or street.

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*

subsections.text: supersede or conflict with an existing statute regulating the marking of a road or street; or
void or supersede the authority of a local governmental agency to regulate and mark a road or street.
